## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Promptfoo and GrowthX to discuss content production progress and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/2pbZXNvF8kakYB4s1LuV7fyFUeTZu3sS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Backlog of articles needs review; Vanessa to start reviewing this afternoon](https://fathom.video/share/2pbZXNvF8kakYB4s1LuV7fyFUeTZu3sS?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [3 out of 4 proposed new topics approved; ASCII smuggling topic removed](https://fathom.video/share/2pbZXNvF8kakYB4s1LuV7fyFUeTZu3sS?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Image/diagram creation for articles is a challenge; exploring solutions](https://fathom.video/share/2pbZXNvF8kakYB4s1LuV7fyFUeTZu3sS?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Quality of content has improved, but detailed feedback pending review](https://fathom.video/share/2pbZXNvF8kakYB4s1LuV7fyFUeTZu3sS?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)

## Topics

### Content Review Status

  - [4 articles need final sign-off for publication](https://fathom.video/share/2pbZXNvF8kakYB4s1LuV7fyFUeTZu3sS?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [9 articles need initial review from Promptfoo](https://fathom.video/share/2pbZXNvF8kakYB4s1LuV7fyFUeTZu3sS?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Vanessa provided feedback on existing topics, now listed in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/2pbZXNvF8kakYB4s1LuV7fyFUeTZu3sS?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [Backlog review is the main bottleneck; Promptfoo team to prioritize](https://fathom.video/share/2pbZXNvF8kakYB4s1LuV7fyFUeTZu3sS?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)

### New Content Topics

  - [16 new topics proposed in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/2pbZXNvF8kakYB4s1LuV7fyFUeTZu3sS?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [4 highlighted in Slack for quick review](https://fathom.video/share/2pbZXNvF8kakYB4s1LuV7fyFUeTZu3sS?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [Ian approved 3 out of 4 topics:](https://fathom.video/share/2pbZXNvF8kakYB4s1LuV7fyFUeTZu3sS?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
      - [Deep dives into RAG subcategories](https://fathom.video/share/2pbZXNvF8kakYB4s1LuV7fyFUeTZu3sS?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
      - [Vector database security (replacing ASCII smuggling)](https://fathom.video/share/2pbZXNvF8kakYB4s1LuV7fyFUeTZu3sS?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [Team to prioritize these 3 topics for next week](https://fathom.video/share/2pbZXNvF8kakYB4s1LuV7fyFUeTZu3sS?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)

### Visual Content Challenges

  - [Promptfoo requests breaking text with diagrams/images](https://fathom.video/share/2pbZXNvF8kakYB4s1LuV7fyFUeTZu3sS?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [GrowthX can include references to existing internet resources](https://fathom.video/share/2pbZXNvF8kakYB4s1LuV7fyFUeTZu3sS?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [Creating custom images/diagrams is challenging for GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/2pbZXNvF8kakYB4s1LuV7fyFUeTZu3sS?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Exploring solutions:](https://fathom.video/share/2pbZXNvF8kakYB4s1LuV7fyFUeTZu3sS?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
      - [Repurposing existing content](https://fathom.video/share/2pbZXNvF8kakYB4s1LuV7fyFUeTZu3sS?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
      - [Using stock/AI-generated images with brand elements](https://fathom.video/share/2pbZXNvF8kakYB4s1LuV7fyFUeTZu3sS?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Potential future use of DataGrid's agentic AI for image identification](https://fathom.video/share/2pbZXNvF8kakYB4s1LuV7fyFUeTZu3sS?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)

### Content Quality

  - [Initial impression shows an increase in quality](https://fathom.video/share/2pbZXNvF8kakYB4s1LuV7fyFUeTZu3sS?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Detailed feedback pending after thorough review](https://fathom.video/share/2pbZXNvF8kakYB4s1LuV7fyFUeTZu3sS?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
